job_title: Machine Learning Engineer/Senior Machine Learning Engineer - Infra
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
must_have_quals: BS/MS with 2-3 years of industry experience required, Proven experience designing, deploying, and managing infrastructure on AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, etc.), Proficiency in scripting languages (e.g., Python) and compiled languages (e.g., C++, Go, Rust), Strong experience with Git and repository management, Excellent problem-solving skills and a proactive attitude, with the ability to anticipate needs and drive projects to completion, Strong communication and interpersonal skills to effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams and influence technical decisions, Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and adapt to evolving requirements while adhering to corporate guidelines, BS/MS with 3-5 years of industry experience required, Demonstrated ability to lead technical projects from conception to completion and deliver high-quality, scalable, and reliable software
preferred_quals: Extensive experience with large-scale ML model platforms and tools, Deep understanding and experience with PyTorch implementation, especially regarding scaling inference performance, A history of significant contributions to open-source projects or industry standards
core_responsibilities: Design, implement, and maintain scalable and reliable ML infrastructure, Collaborate closely with ML engineers and data scientists to understand and address their infrastructure needs, Document infrastructure designs, processes, and operational procedures, Proactively identify and solve complex, often cross-functional, technical problems within the ML infrastructure domain, Mentor junior engineers and drive technical alignment and influence across teams
job_summary: Genentech is a leading biotechnology company focused on innovation and healthcare access. They are seeking a highly motivated and skilled Machine Learning Engineer/Senior Machine Learning Engineer to enhance their ML infrastructure, collaborating closely with engineers and data scientists to address their needs and drive technical solutions.
